title: JFrog Artifactory Firm-Wide Outage — Under Investigation
rca: Unknown. JFrog Artifactory is returning HTTP 503 errors firm-wide. Root cause investigation is in progress. No information available yet.
resolution_steps: 1. Ticket opened and assigned to JFrog Infrastructure Team
2. Engineers investigating — no root cause identified yet
business_impact: All CI/CD pipelines firm-wide unable to pull or push artifacts. Approximately 47 engineers blocked across 8 squads. Release train scheduled for 08:30 UTC at risk.

communication_log.note: First reports of 503 errors from engineers
JFrog infra team assigned, investigation started
